taxonomy: Dischidia lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Dischidia, which comprises about 60 species of plants. The genus Dischidia is part of the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. This classification indicates that Dischidia lanceolata is a member of the angiosperm group of plants. Dischidia lanceolata is native to tropical regions of Asia.
